languages.text: {n}Лария еле заметно кивает вам и закрывает глаза. Понять, что она жива, можно лишь по хриплому бульканью, издаваемому пробитыми легкими в упрямых попытках дышать.{/n}
{n}Laria gives you the faintest of nods and closes her eyes. The only sign that she still lives is the rasping gurgle of her pierced lungs in their stubborn struggle to draw breath.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Лария еле заметно кивает вам и закрывает глаза. Понять, что она жива, можно лишь по хриплому бульканью, издаваемому пробитыми легкими в упрямых попытках дышать.{/n}

languages.text: {n}菈丽雅朝你几不可见地点了点头，随后闭上了双眼。唯一能证明她尚在人世的是那被刺穿的肺拼命呼吸发出的粗哑的水泡音。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria gives you the faintest of nods and closes her eyes. The only sign that she still lives is the rasping gurgle of her pierced lungs in their stubborn struggle to draw breath.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}菈丽雅朝你几不可见地点了点头，随后闭上了双眼。唯一能证明她尚在人世的是那被刺穿的肺拼命呼吸发出的粗哑的水泡音。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Laria asiente de forma casi imperceptible y cierra los ojos. La única señal de que aún vive es el gorgoteo de sus pulmones perforados, que se esfuerzan tozudamente por respirar.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria gives you the faintest of nods and closes her eyes. The only sign that she still lives is the rasping gurgle of her pierced lungs in their stubborn struggle to draw breath.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria asiente de forma casi imperceptible y cierra los ojos. La única señal de que aún vive es el gorgoteo de sus pulmones perforados, que se esfuerzan tozudamente por respirar.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Laria vous adresse un infime signe de tête et ferme les yeux. Le gargouillement de ses poumons transpercés et sa respiration laborieuse sont les seuls signes indiquant qu'elle est encore en vie.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria gives you the faintest of nods and closes her eyes. The only sign that she still lives is the rasping gurgle of her pierced lungs in their stubborn struggle to draw breath.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria vous adresse un infime signe de tête et ferme les yeux. Le gargouillement de ses poumons transpercés et sa respiration laborieuse sont les seuls signes indiquant qu'elle est encore en vie.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Laria belli belirsiz başını sallıyor ve gözlerini kapatıyor. Delinmiş akciğerlerinin nefes almak için verdiği inatçı mücadeledeki o hırıltılı gurultu, hâlâ yaşadığına dair tek belirti olarak kendini gösteriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria gives you the faintest of nods and closes her eyes. The only sign that she still lives is the rasping gurgle of her pierced lungs in their stubborn struggle to draw breath.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria belli belirsiz başını sallıyor ve gözlerini kapatıyor. Delinmiş akciğerlerinin nefes almak için verdiği inatçı mücadeledeki o hırıltılı gurultu, hâlâ yaşadığına dair tek belirti olarak kendini gösteriyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Laria nickt dir schwach zu und schließt die Augen. Das einzige Anzeichen, dass sie noch lebt, ist das rasselnde Gurgeln ihrer durchbohrten Lunge, als sie verzweifelt nach Luft ringt.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria gives you the faintest of nods and closes her eyes. The only sign that she still lives is the rasping gurgle of her pierced lungs in their stubborn struggle to draw breath.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria nickt dir schwach zu und schließt die Augen. Das einzige Anzeichen, dass sie noch lebt, ist das rasselnde Gurgeln ihrer durchbohrten Lunge, als sie verzweifelt nach Luft ringt.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ラリアはわずかに首を振って目を閉じた。息を吸おうとする頑固な肺の擦れるような息が、彼女がまだ生きていることを示す唯一の兆しである。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria gives you the faintest of nods and closes her eyes. The only sign that she still lives is the rasping gurgle of her pierced lungs in their stubborn struggle to draw breath.{/n}
